calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-06-2023 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2022 Set For Trial On Jan-09-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plant Construction Company L.P.'s unopposed demurrer is mooted by the notice of partial settlement filed December 22, 2021.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which is verbatim with the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2021 Continued To Feb-16-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, L.P.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Plant Construction Company, LP's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. The parties are ordered to immediately meet and confer. Defendant's response to the compliant is now due by December 30, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
